name: ExtensionSearchParameter_Modifier
title: R5: missing | exact | contains | not | text | in | not-in | below | above | type | identifier | of-type | code-text | text-advanced | iterate additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SearchParameter.modifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SearchParameter.modifier` 0..* `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SearchParameter.modifier` 0..* `code`
*  R4B: `SearchParameter.modifier` 0..* `code`
*  R4: `SearchParameter.modifier` 0..* `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SearchParameter.modifier` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `SearchParameter.modifier` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `SearchParameter.modifier` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.
